# Preface {.unnumbered}

```{r, eval=TRUE, include=FALSE}
# Automatically create a bib database for R packages.
knitr::write_bib(c(.packages(), 'bookdown', 'knitr', 'rmarkdown'),
                 'packages.bib')

knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = TRUE)
set.seed(123) 
```

Material for a introductory block course in Statistics and Data Science with R, taught at the University of Regensburg. The main topics are:

-   1: Getting started with R and descriptive statistics

-   2: Graphics

-   3: Statistical inference

-   4: Hypthesis testing and linear regression (simple, multiple)

-   5: Generalised linear models (GLM) and multivariate statistics

-   6: Data science skills, data analysis projects workflow, and predictive modeling

Link to the UR GRIPS course [here](https://elearning.uni-regensburg.de/course/view.php?id=54766) (requires UR account).
